title: Connection
description: Represents a connection to a data source or target in Informatica Intelligent Cloud Services.

id.description: The unique identifier for the connection.

orgId.description: The organization ID that owns the connection.

type.description: The connection type (e.g., Oracle, Salesforce, MySQL, SqlServer, FTP, CSVFile).

createTime.description: The time the connection was created.

updateTime.description: The time the connection was last updated.

createdBy.description: The user who created the connection.

updatedBy.description: The user who last updated the connection.

agentId.description: The ID of the Secure Agent associated with the connection.

runtimeEnvironmentId.description: The ID of the runtime environment associated with the connection.

host.description: The hostname or IP address for the connection. Applicable to database and server-based connections.

port.description: The port number for the connection. Applicable to database and server-based connections.

database.description: The database name or service name for the connection.

authenticationType.description: The authentication method used by the connection.

serviceUrl.description: The service endpoint URL. Applicable to web service and cloud application connections.

codepage.description: The character encoding for the connection (e.g., UTF-8).

connParams.description: Additional connection parameters specific to the connection type. Contains attributes not listed as top-level fields.
